name: Kalapawai Cafe
tagline: Kailua's neighborhood anchor since 1932 — sunrise coffee to dinner wine, go every day and never get bored.
parking: Small lot behind cafe on Kailua Rd; additional street parking on surrounding blocks
talkStory: The Kalapawai brand dates back to 1932 as a plantation-era corner store in Kailua — the name comes from the Hawaiian word for the area near Kalapawai Beach. The modern cafe at 750 Kailua Road is the flagship, run by the Becker family with a focus on locally sourced ingredients and a wine program featuring small family-owned wineries. The Kailua Club sandwich and bacon-wrapped figs are local favorites. Open breakfast through dinner, making it Kailua's all-day neighborhood anchor.
